added_sources.title: Microsoft Form 10-Q for Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
added_sources.evidence_summary: SEC-hosted 10-Q provides official financial statement support for Microsoft's quarter ended March 31, 2026.
limitations: Historical filing evidence; forward guidance requires earnings-call or issuer guidance support.

added_sources.title: Microsoft (MSFT) Q3 2026 Earnings Transcript
added_sources.evidence_summary: Transcript coverage includes management guidance context for Q4 FY2026 costs, operating expenses, and fiscal 2026 operating-margin direction.
limitations: Secondary transcript; prefer issuer-hosted transcript if available.

added_sources.title: Microsoft Q3 2026 Earnings Report
added_sources.evidence_summary: Secondary report summarizes Q4 FY2026 revenue guidance near $86.7 billion to $87.8 billion and AI-capex context.
limitations: Secondary aggregator; does not replace issuer guidance or SEC filing evidence.

added_sources.title: Microsoft (MSFT) Stock Forecast and Analyst Price Targets
added_sources.evidence_summary: StockAnalysis provides analyst forecast context including Strong Buy consensus and average target near $565.75.
limitations: Secondary source; reconcile against other providers before final valuation language.

added_sources.title: Microsoft (MSFT) Stock Forecast and Price Target
added_sources.evidence_summary: MarketBeat provides analyst consensus context including Moderate Buy consensus and average target near $556.15.
limitations: Secondary source; does not replace direct analyst notes.

missing_evidence: Issuer transcript or official guidance-table extraction
retrieval_actions: Attach Microsoft IR FY26 Q3 release
Attach secondary Q4 revenue guidance cross-check
reinforcement_tasks.rationale: Latest company guidance is supported by primary issuer earnings context plus secondary transcript/report guidance details. Final reporting must preserve that the exact guidance table still prefers issuer-hosted transcript extraction.
residual_gaps: Automate issuer transcript extraction for future MSFT reruns.

missing_evidence: Exact EPS input behind any baseline forward valuation point estimate
retrieval_actions: Attach StockAnalysis and MarketBeat forecast sources
Run Stage 2C direct computable metric reconciliation
reinforcement_tasks.rationale: Valuation is carried forward as an assumption-based range using secondary analyst forecast sources until exact EPS or multiple inputs are independently tied to source evidence.
residual_gaps: Exact source-backed EPS input behind any specific baseline valuation point estimate remains required.

missing_evidence: Direct exchange or FINRA short-interest record
retrieval_actions: Attach short-interest source and analyst-consensus sources
reinforcement_tasks.rationale: Positioning and analyst-consensus claims have numeric secondary support; squeeze/crowding conclusions must remain constrained without direct exchange/FINRA validation.
residual_gaps: Prefer direct exchange/FINRA short-interest data before high-conviction crowding or squeeze language.

retrieval_actions: Attach official policy source and source-dated sector context
reinforcement_tasks.rationale: Macro and sector context are supported as backdrop, not direct issuer validation.
